meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Design With AI: How Freelancers Solve No Marketing Skills
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with marketing. Learn to design with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-converting assets for your clients fast.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to succeed; you need an AI-driven workflow. By integrating Antigravity for rapid asset generation and Claude Code for automated implementation, you can produce professional-grade marketing designs in minutes, effectively bridging the skill gap and increasing your billable project value immediately.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the cursor blinks, and your client is waiting for a high-converting landing page. You’re a builder, a coder, a problem solver—but the marketing side feels like a foreign language. You know the tech works, but without the visual polish and persuasive design, your projects stall at the finish line.

It’s time to stop treating marketing as an afterthought. By leveraging AI as your design partner, you can synthesize high-converting layouts and compelling copy in the time it takes to brew a cup of coffee. This isn't about becoming a designer; it's about becoming a force multiplier for your own development workflow.

steps.title: Define Your Brand Identity Constraints
steps.description: Establish a consistent visual language before generating assets to ensure your AI outputs align with professional standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a design system configuration for a clean, modern SaaS landing page. Include a color palette (hex codes), typography pairings, and button styles that prioritize high conversion rates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review the design system and generate a tailwind.config.js file based on these constraints.'

steps.title: Generate High-Conversion Wireframes
steps.description: Convert abstract requirements into structured layouts that guide user attention effectively.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a landing page wireframe structure for a B2B SaaS tool. Focus on a hero section with a strong CTA, feature grid, and social proof section.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create index.tsx file using the generated structure and Tailwind CSS classes.'

steps.title: Automate Copywriting with Context
steps.description: Inject persuasive, benefit-driven copy into your UI components using AI context.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write persuasive, benefit-focused copy for a SaaS hero section. Focus on the 'problem-agitation-solution' framework for a productivity app.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Replace placeholder text in hero section with the generated copy and ensure line lengths are optimized for readability.'

steps.title: Implement Responsive Design Patterns
steps.description: Ensure your AI-generated designs look flawless on all devices through automated media query generation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive design strategy for a mobile-first layout. Provide specific break-point adjustments for the feature grid.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Apply responsive modifiers to all component containers in the project and test for mobile viewport alignment.'

steps.title: Final QA and Asset Optimization
steps.description: Use Claude Code to audit your generated code for performance bottlenecks and design inconsistencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current landing page code for common conversion friction points and accessibility compliance.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Scan the codebase for accessibility violations and performance optimizations. Apply necessary fixes.'

pro_tips: Always feed your client's existing brand guidelines into your AI context window before starting a new project.
Use 'Component-First' generation; design individual UI blocks separately to maintain modularity and easier refactoring.
When using Claude Code, always ask it to 'explain the logic' of its design choices to learn better patterns yourself.
Automate your image asset generation by including size specifications in your Antigravity prompts to avoid layout shifts.
Keep a library of 'proven prompt templates' for specific sections like Pricing Tables or Testimonial sliders to save time.
content.next_steps: After completing these steps, deploy your first landing page to a platform like Vercel or Netlify. Use the feedback from your first client project to refine your prompt library, creating a repeatable 'Marketing-in-a-Box' system you can sell as an add-on service.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the technical edge to turn any project into a marketing powerhouse without hiring an agency. Stop guessing and start shipping professional assets that convert. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
